CREATE TABLE test_strings (id INT, value VARCHAR(255));
INSERT INTO test_strings (id, value) VALUES (1, 'test'), (2, NULL), (3, 'example');
CREATE FUNCTION my_length() RETURNS INT AS 'return bif_string_arg(value);';
SELECT my_length(value) FROM test_strings WHERE value IS NOT NULL;
SELECT bif_string_or_null_arg(value) FROM test_strings WHERE id = 1;
SELECT bif_string_arg('Hello, world!') AS greeting;
SELECT bif_array_arg(ARRAY[1, 2, 3]) AS number_array;
SELECT bif_array_or_null_arg(NULL) AS empty_array;
CREATE TABLE test_numbers (id INT, num_value FLOAT);
INSERT INTO test_numbers (id, num_value) VALUES (1, 1.5), (2, NULL), (3, 2.5);
SELECT bif_float_arg(num_value) FROM test_numbers WHERE id = 1;
SELECT bif_double_arg(num_value) FROM test_numbers WHERE id = 3;
CREATE TABLE test_entities (id INT, entity_value VARCHAR(100));
INSERT INTO test_entities (id, entity_value) VALUES (1, 'Entity1'), (2, 'Entity2');
SELECT bif_entity_arg(entity_value) FROM test_entities;
SELECT bif_long_arg(123456789) AS long_number;
SELECT bif_long_or_char_arg(123) AS long_or_char_value;
SELECT bif_bin_arg('binary data') AS binary_output;
SELECT bif_strses_arg(ARRAY['string1', 'string2']) AS string_array;
SELECT bif_string_or_wide_or_null_arg(NULL) AS null_string;
